notes: Bulk-generation-first candidate created with built-in imagegen. QA, legal/license review, final approval, and runtime integration deferred until all candidates exist. Deferred transparency QA (2026-05-08): alpha-sensitive candidate is RGB/no real alpha in probe samples; cleanup is required before review or integration gates can reopen.
final_prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: consumable scroll icon set for Orbwalker
Primary request: production candidate consumable icon sheet for elemental scrolls and tactical one-use items.
Subject: eight fantasy consumable icons in a 4x2 sheet: fire scroll, ice scroll, earth scroll, healing scroll, armor ward scroll, gold charm scroll, reroll scroll, emergency escape scroll. Scrolls should have distinct seals and elemental effects.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game inventory icons, crisp mobile slot readability.
Composition/framing: 4x2 sheet, equal-size icons, centered, transparent-background cutout feel, no labels.
Lighting/mood: magical utility items, clear elemental identity.
Color palette: parchment, wax seals, fire orange, ice cyan, earth green, heart rose, silver armor, gold.
Constraints: no readable text, no labels, no logo, no watermark, no gore, no casino imagery, avoid tiny glyphs that resemble text.
